operatorPrincipleTitle: Producers stay focused on advice and closing.
operatorPrincipleBody: The Operator handles lead response, policy intake, renewal reminders, appointment booking, task creation, carrier follow-up, and escalation routing.
operatorPrincipleMetricDetail: of service and intake actions handled before producer involvement.
todaySummaryBody: Quotes triaged, renewals chased, appointments booked, tasks routed, and only advisory decisions escalated.

activityFeed.summary: Sent renewal reminder to commercial client
Created task to collect driver details
Escalated coverage gap question to producer
Updated policy stage and next action

messages.speaker: Prospect
messages.message: We close on a house next month. Can you quote homeowners insurance?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: Yes. I can collect the address, closing date, lender requirements, and current coverage details now.

messages.speaker: Client
messages.message: Our renewal premium jumped. Can someone review it?

messages.speaker: Operator
messages.message: I can gather the renewal documents and route this for review.

messages.speaker: Operator Action
messages.message: Created renewal review task + escalated coverage question.

tasks.title: Collect closing date from Julia Santos
Request driver details from Ben Walker
Review coverage gap for Summit Logistics

escalations.title: Coverage gap question
escalations.why: Client described exposure that may require advisory judgment.
escalations.next: Producer should review existing limits before reply.
escalations.draft: I want to review your current limits before recommending a path. We will look at the exposure and options carefully.

escalations.title: Premium increase objection
escalations.why: Client may need retention strategy and remarketing decision.
escalations.next: Producer should decide whether to remarket or explain carrier factors.
escalations.draft: I understand the concern. We can review what changed and decide whether a remarket makes sense.

escalations.title: Carrier exception request
escalations.why: Prospect asked for coverage outside normal appetite.
escalations.draft: This may require a carrier exception. I am routing it for review before we set expectations.

demoScenario.title: Live Demo Scenario
steps: Producer is notified only if coverage judgment is needed

events.summary: Escalation created because coverage judgment was detected
